notes: Single public function run_backtest(config: MarketMindConfig, args) -> int. Imports config/settings. Late imports (ShadowStateDB, BacktestRunner) inside function — avoids circular deps. No import from app.py. Returns 0 on success, 1 on ValueError/FileNotFoundError/unexpected exception. Called by app.py line 63 (entry point dispatch) — downward dependency, not upward.
